title: gymnogramma chrysoconia
intro: Gymnogramma chrysoconia, also known as the golden fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gymnogramma chrysoconia include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
